member.name: T:TasteHub.AppShell
member.summary: App shell defining the navigation structure with tab bar and registered routes for detail pages

member.name: T:TasteHub.MauiProgram
member.summary: Main entry point for the MAUI application, configuring services, view models and pages via dependency injection

member.name: T:TasteHub.Models.Coupon
member.summary: Coupon model for the shake-to-earn coupon feature

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Coupon.Id
member.summary: Primary key, auto-increment ID

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Coupon.Code
member.summary: Coupon code

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Coupon.Description
member.summary: Coupon description

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Coupon.Discount
member.summary: Discount percentage (e.g. 10 means 10% off)

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Coupon.IsUsed
member.summary: Whether the coupon has been used

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Coupon.ObtainedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when the coupon was obtained

member.name: T:TasteHub.Models.Recipe
member.summary: Recipe data model for storing food and drink recipe information

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Recipe.Id
member.summary: Primary key, auto-increment ID

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Recipe.Name
member.summary: Recipe name

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Recipe.Category
member.summary: Main category: Food or Drink

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Recipe.SubCategory
member.summary: Sub-category: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Dessert, Cold Drink, Hot Drink, etc.

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Recipe.Description
member.summary: Recipe description

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Recipe.Ingredients
member.summary: Ingredients list stored as JSON string

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Recipe.Steps
member.summary: Cooking steps stored as JSON string

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Recipe.ImagePath
member.summary: Cover image file path

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Recipe.Calories
member.summary: Calories (kcal)

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Recipe.Protein
member.summary: Protein in grams

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Recipe.Carbs
member.summary: Carbohydrates in grams

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Recipe.Fat
member.summary: Fat in grams

member.name: P:TasteHub.Models.Recipe.CreatedAt
member.summary: Record creation timestamp

member.name: T:TasteHub.Services.DatabaseService
member.summary: SQLite database service implementing all CRUD operations

member.name: P:TasteHub.Services.DatabaseService.DatabasePath
member.summary: Full path to the SQLite database file

member.name: M:TasteHub.Services.DatabaseService.InitAsync
member.summary: Initialise the database connection and create tables if they do not exist

member.name: M:TasteHub.Services.DatabaseService.SeedSampleDataAsync
member.summary: Insert sample recipes so the app is not empty on first launch

member.name: M:TasteHub.Services.DatabaseService.GetAllRecipesAsync
member.summary: Retrieve all recipes from the database

member.name: M:TasteHub.Services.DatabaseService.GetRecipesByCategoryAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve recipes filtered by main category (Food or Drink)

member.name: M:TasteHub.Services.DatabaseService.SearchRecipesAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Search recipes by name or description

member.name: M:TasteHub.Services.DatabaseService.GetRecipeByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieve a single recipe by its ID

member.name: M:TasteHub.Services.DatabaseService.SaveRecipeAsync(TasteHub.Models.Recipe)
member.summary: Insert a new recipe or update an existing one

member.name: M:TasteHub.Services.DatabaseService.DeleteRecipeAsync(TasteHub.Models.Recipe)
member.summary: Delete a recipe from the database

member.name: M:TasteHub.Services.DatabaseService.GetAllCouponsAsync
member.summary: Retrieve all coupons from the database

member.name: M:TasteHub.Services.DatabaseService.SaveCouponAsync(TasteHub.Models.Coupon)
member.summary: Save a new coupon to the database

member.name: T:TasteHub.Services.IDatabaseService
member.summary: Interface for database operations on recipes and coupons

member.name: T:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel
member.summary: View model for the Add/Edit page, handling recipe creation and modification with camera integration for cover photos

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._recipeId
member.summary: Recipe ID for edit mode; 0 means adding a new recipe

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._isEditMode
member.summary: Whether the form is in edit mode

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._recipeName
member.summary: Recipe name input

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._selectedCategory
member.summary: Selected main category: Food or Drink

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._selectedSubCategory
member.summary: Selected sub-category

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._description
member.summary: Recipe description input

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._imagePath
member.summary: Cover image file path

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._caloriesText
member.summary: Calories input

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._proteinText
member.summary: Protein input

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._carbsText
member.summary: Carbohydrates input

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._fatText
member.summary: Fat input

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._nameError
member.summary: Validation error for recipe name

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._categoryError
member.summary: Validation error for category

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._nutritionError
member.summary: Validation error for nutrition fields

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._ingredientsError
member.summary: Validation error for ingredients

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._stepsError
member.summary: Validation error for steps

member.name: P:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.Ingredients
member.summary: List of ingredients the user has added

member.name: P:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.Steps
member.summary: List of cooking steps the user has added

member.name: P:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.Categories
member.summary: Available main categories

member.name: P:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.SubCategories
member.summary: Available sub-categories, changes based on selected main category

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._newIngredient
member.summary: New ingredient text input

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel._newStep
member.summary: New step text input

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.#ctor(TasteHub.Services.IDatabaseService)
member.summary: Constructor with dependency injection of database service

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.UpdateSubCategories
member.summary: Populate sub-category list based on the selected main category

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.LoadRecipeAsync
member.summary: Load recipe data from database for editing

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.AddIngredient
member.summary: Add a new ingredient to the list

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.RemoveIngredient(System.String)
member.summary: Remove an ingredient from the list

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.AddStep
member.summary: Add a new cooking step to the list

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.RemoveStep(System.String)
member.summary: Remove a cooking step from the list

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.TakePhotoAsync
member.summary: Take a photo using the device camera for the recipe cover image

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.PickPhotoAsync
member.summary: Pick an existing photo from the device gallery

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.ValidateForm
member.summary: Validate all form fields and return true if valid

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.SaveRecipeAsync
member.summary: Save the recipe to the database after validation

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.OnRecipeIdChanged(System.Int32)
member.summary: Load existing recipe data when RecipeId is set (edit mode)

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.AddEditViewModel.OnSelectedCategoryChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Update sub-category options when main category changes

member.name: T:TasteHub.ViewModels.BaseViewModel
member.summary: Base view model providing shared properties for all view models

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.BaseViewModel._isBusy
member.summary: Indicates whether the view model is currently loading data

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.BaseViewModel._title
member.summary: Title displayed on the page

member.name: T:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel
member.summary: View model for the Detail page, displaying full recipe information with text-to-speech step-by-step reading

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel._recipeId
member.summary: Recipe ID passed via navigation query

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel._recipe
member.summary: The full recipe object loaded from database

member.name: P:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel.IngredientsList
member.summary: Parsed list of ingredients for display

member.name: P:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel.StepsList
member.summary: Parsed list of cooking steps for display

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel._currentReadingStep
member.summary: Index of the step currently being read aloud by TTS

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel._isReading
member.summary: Whether TTS is currently reading steps

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel._imageScale
member.summary: Current image scale for pinch-to-zoom

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel.#ctor(TasteHub.Services.IDatabaseService)
member.summary: Constructor with dependency injection of database service

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel.LoadRecipeAsync
member.summary: Load the full recipe from the database and parse ingredients and steps

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel.ReadStepsAloudAsync
member.summary: Read all cooking steps aloud using text-to-speech, highlighting the current step visually

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel.EditRecipeAsync
member.summary: Navigate to the edit page for the current recipe

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel.DeleteRecipeAsync
member.summary: Delete the current recipe with confirmation

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.DetailViewModel.OnRecipeIdChanged(System.Int32)
member.summary: Load recipe data when the RecipeId property changes

member.name: T:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel
member.summary: View model for the Home page, handling recipe listing, search, category filtering, barometer recommendation and shake-to-earn coupon

member.name: P:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel.Recipes
member.summary: Full collection of recipes displayed in the list

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel._selectedCategory
member.summary: Currently selected category filter: All, Food, or Drink

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel._searchText
member.summary: User search query text

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel._recommendedRecipe
member.summary: Barometer-based recommended recipe

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel._showCouponPopup
member.summary: Whether a coupon popup should be displayed

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel._latestCoupon
member.summary: Most recently earned coupon

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel._currentPressure
member.summary: Current barometer pressure reading in hPa

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel.#ctor(TasteHub.Services.IDatabaseService)
member.summary: Constructor with dependency injection of database service

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel.LoadRecipesAsync
member.summary: Load all recipes from the database and apply current filters

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel.GoToDetailAsync(TasteHub.Models.Recipe)
member.summary: Navigate to the recipe detail page

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel.GoToAddRecipeAsync
member.summary: Navigate to the add recipe page

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel.DeleteRecipeAsync(TasteHub.Models.Recipe)
member.summary: Delete a recipe with confirmation dialog

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel.ShakeDetectedAsync
member.summary: Generate a random coupon when the user shakes the device

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel.UpdateBarometerRecommendationAsync(System.Double)
member.summary: Recommend a recipe based on barometer pressure reading. Low pressure suggests warm food/drinks, high pressure suggests cold ones.

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel.OnSelectedCategoryChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Filter recipes when the selected category changes

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.HomeViewModel.OnSearchTextChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Filter recipes when the search text changes

member.name: T:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel
member.summary: View model for the Interactive cooking page, handling accelerometer, gyroscope and shake hardware features for simulated cooking experience

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._recipeName
member.summary: Name of the recipe being prepared

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._recipeCategory
member.summary: Category of the recipe (Food or Drink)

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._tiltAngle
member.summary: Current tilt angle of the device in degrees

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._pourProgress
member.summary: Pour progress from 0 to 100 based on tilt angle

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._pourCompleted
member.summary: Whether the pouring step is completed

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._pourLabel
member.summary: Label describing the pour action based on recipe category

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._rotationSpeed
member.summary: Current rotation speed detected by gyroscope

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._stirProgress
member.summary: Stir progress from 0 to 100 based on cumulative rotation

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._stirCompleted
member.summary: Whether the stirring step is completed

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._stirAnimationAngle
member.summary: Visual rotation angle for the stir animation

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._shakeCount
member.summary: Number of shakes detected

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._shakeProgress
member.summary: Shake progress from 0 to 100 based on shake count

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._shakeCompleted
member.summary: Whether the shaking step is completed

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._currentStep
member.summary: Current step index (0=Pour, 1=Stir, 2=Shake)

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._allCompleted
member.summary: Whether all cooking steps are completed

member.name: F:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel._statusMessage
member.summary: Status message displayed to the user

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel.UpdateAccelerometer(System.Double)
member.summary: Process accelerometer reading to update pour progress. Maps tilt angle to a 0-100 progress value.

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel.UpdateGyroscope(System.Double)
member.summary: Process gyroscope reading to update stir progress. Maps rotation speed to stir animation and progress.

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel.ShakeDetected
member.summary: Increment shake count and update progress when a shake is detected

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel.ResetCooking
member.summary: Reset all progress and start the cooking process again

member.name: M:TasteHub.ViewModels.InteractiveViewModel.OnRecipeCategoryChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Update pour label based on recipe category

member.summary: The backing field for .

member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.summary: Currently selected font size label

member.summary: Set font size to Large (20px)

member.summary: Set font size to Extra Large (24px)

member.summary: Apply the selected font size to the application resources

member.summary: Toggle between dark and light theme

member.name: T:TasteHub.Views.AddEditPage
member.summary: Page for adding a new recipe or editing an existing one, with camera integration for cover photos

member.name: T:TasteHub.Views.DetailPage
member.summary: Detail page showing full recipe information with TTS and pinch-to-zoom

member.name: M:TasteHub.Views.DetailPage.OnPinchUpdated(System.Object,Microsoft.Maui.Controls.PinchGestureUpdatedEventArgs)
member.summary: Handle pinch gesture to zoom the recipe cover image

member.name: M:TasteHub.Views.DetailPage.OnCookClicked(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Navigate to interactive cooking page with recipe info

member.name: T:TasteHub.Views.SettingsPage
member.summary: Settings page for managing theme, font size and viewing accessibility information

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_Button.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Button,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_DatePicker.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.DatePicker,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)

member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not

The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation

The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not

member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not
